name: Deckdrop Studio
description: Build, run, troubleshoot, or extend a DeckDrop-style macOS slide workflow that turns PDFs, docs, presentations, and image sets into editable PowerPoint drafts with human review before export. Use when Codex needs to work on a workspace containing `DeckDropApp`; inspect the ingestion, extraction, planning, review, and export pipeline; regenerate the Xcode project; or validate the DeckDrop app and tests.
short_description: Editable slide workflows for mixed-source decks
audience: Mac users turning PDFs, docs, presentations, and image sets into editable slide drafts
Teams that need a human review step before PowerPoint export
Builders maintaining the DeckDrop ingestion, planning, and export pipeline
detail_lines: Keeps mixed source intake, extraction, planning, draft review, and `.pptx` export represented as one DeckDrop workflow.
Presents DeckDrop as a review-first slide builder, not a last-mile deck packaging shortcut.
Uses explicit local workspaces and user-selected source files, with no hidden network sync or broad account-token requirements.
